seriesOrComponentName.description: Soil series or component name from the header

mapUnitSymbol.description: Map unit symbol from the header

classification.description: Soil taxonomic classification from the header

describers.description: Describer initials or names from the Describer(s) field

date.description: Date of description as printed on the form

airTemperature.description: Air temperature as printed, including unit

latitude.description: Latitude as printed on the form

longitude.description: Longitude as printed on the form

datum.description: Geodetic datum from the Datum field

location.description: Location description from the Location field

elevation.description: Elevation as printed on the form

aspect.description: Aspect as printed on the form

slopePercent.description: Slope percent as printed on the form

drainage.description: Drainage class from the Drainage field

parentMaterial.description: Parent material description from the header

landCoverUse.description: Land cover or use from the header

soilHorizons.description: Rows of the handwritten soil horizon description table

depth.description: Depth range of the horizon in inches as printed (e.g. 0 - 20)

horizon.description: Horizon designation code (e.g. Ap, A, Bt1)

boundary.description: Horizon boundary code (e.g. AS, CW, GW, AW, DW, DI)

texture.description: Soil texture class as printed (e.g. sil, sicl, cl)
